  "verses": [

      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Leeta tappe iſtwai-
zata/ un tā atrasta/ un tee diwi
tappe pee Rohkeem pakahrti / un
tas tappe Laiku-Grahmataa ee-
rakstihts preeſſch ta Kehnixa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta III. Nodalla.
Amans weens Lifchis / tohp pahr wiſchēem
Gullaineem ta Kehnixa pa:augstinachts : 1.
Bet kad Mardakajus winnam Goda gann
ue parahda : 2. Upskaistahs wiſch pahr to
paschu : 5. Pahrrunna to Kehnixa/ ka tas
zaur Grahmatahm / kas ar ta Kehninga Seh,
geli atſspeesti/ paweht/ ka tee Judi/ ka dum.
pigi Laudis wiſā winna Walstiba taptu
apkauti : 8/10.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ehz ſchthm Leetahm pa-
Baugsfinaja tas Keh-
ninsch Aiswerus Ama-
nu/ Medatus Dehlu to Agagi-
teri/ un eezehle winnu augsti/
un likke winna Krehsfu pahr wiſ-
feem Leeleem-Kungeem / kas pee
winna bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Kehnixa Kalpi /
as Kehnixa Wahrtis bija/ loh-
ijahs un paſlannijahs preeſſch
Amann/ jo tas Kehninsch bij ta
to winna pawehlejs/ bet Mar-
dakajus ne lohzijahs / un ne pa-
lannijahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazztija ta Kehnina
Kalpi/ kas ta Kehnixa Wahrtis
ija/ us Mardakaju : Raphz
ahrkahp tu ta kehutna Pa-
wehleschanu?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta runnaja tee ikDee-
nes us winnu/ bet wiſch teem
ne klaufija / tad stahstija tee to
Amannam/ ka tee redsetu/ ar tah-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu Amans redseja/ ka
Mardakajus ne lohzijahs / nedg
preeſſch winna paſlannijahs /
tad ktua Amans pils Bahrsibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet wiſch ſchkitte wehl
mas effam/ to Rohku ween pee
Mardakaju peelekt / (jo tee bij
wiſſain Mardakajus Laudis
stahstijſchi / ) bet Amans mekle-
ja wiſſus Juddus / kas wiſā
Aāswerusai Walstā bija / Mar-
dakajus Laudis tsdeldeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pirma Mehnefi/ (ſchts irr
tas Mehnes Nisaus) divipades-
mitā Gaddā ta Kehnina Aāswe-
rufa/ tappe metlohts preeſſch A-
ana ikdeenas/ un ik Mehnes /
lihds tam divipadeſmits Mehne-
fim/ tas irr tas Mehnes Adars.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Amans fazztija uſ to
Kehnixu Aāswerusu : Weena
Gauschn Tauta irr iſkaifita/ un
isdallita starp teem Laudim /
wifās tawas Walstibas Tee-
fās/ un winnu Bauſliba irr zit-
tada / ne ka wiſu Lauschu
(Bauſliba/) ir tee ne darra ta
Kehnixa Pawehleschanu/ tapehz
tam Kehnixam ne peeſlahjahs
tohs eeredeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja tas tam Kehnixam pa-
tihk/ tad lai rakstihts tohp / ka
tee ktuhst nomaitati / tad ee-
fwehrſchn es defmits tuhkſtochus
Talentus Sudraba winneem
Rohkā/ kas to Darbu darra/ ka
Ee eeee
"
    }
